These grapes make excellent jellies and wines unlike any other. DO NOT eat them raw. They are much too sour until processed with sugar. Also around wiggley field I have found blackberries, sumac, chamomile, and mulberries. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season:
Plentiful persimmon tree. Wait until squishy and overripe before eating. Access: Public.
